source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage / Crane / Manual Hand Dolly

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, Main Pass Block 283

event.top_event: Load handling injury - crate slid off dolly striking worker's foot
actions_taken: Cold pack applied to reduce swelling
Injured person elevated foot in quarters
Helicopter evacuation onshore for medical evaluation
Medical evaluation and treatment provided onshore
event.summary: On 8 May 2021 at 1100 hours at MP 283 A, two personnel (mechanic and electrician) were moving a 100-pound crate 30 feet across deck grating using a hand dolly to load it into a cargo box. Due to the crate's rectangular shape and size, it could not be balanced equally on the dolly. As personnel pulled the crate across the deck and encountered a 4-inch step-up 2 feet from the cargo box opening, the crate slid off the dolly. The injured person (mechanic) lost grip on the dolly handle and it impacted his right foot just behind the steel toe, causing a contusion. The worker was evacuated by helicopter and placed on light duty for greater than 3 days.
recommendations: Ensure hand dollies are equipped with securing straps to secure loads during transport
Perform Job Safety Analysis (JSA) to identify potential hazards before task execution
Document risk assessments for manual handling tasks

hazards.name: Manual load handling with inadequate equipment

threats.name: Load slippage from dolly due to inadequate securing mechanism
Loss of grip on dolly handle during load movement
Operator error in load balancing and transport technique

consequences.name: Foot injury - contusion to right foot
Lost work time greater than 3 days
Helicopter evacuation and medical treatment costs

controls.name: Hand dolly equipped with securing strap
controls.lod_basis: Primary engineering control to secure load

supporting_text: The hand dolly was not equipped with a securing strap which could have been used to secure the load during transport
BSEE found the probable cause of this incident to be a lack of proper equipment for the job

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for manual handling tasks
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards and control measures before task execution
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to assess risks prior to work

supporting_text: The AI found a JSA was not utilized to identify potential hazards associated with the job task
Personnel did not document a risk assessment for the task as no JSA was performed

controls.name: Proper load balancing technique and two-person coordination
controls.barrier_role: Maintain control of load during transport across obstacles
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control dependent on human performance

supporting_text: Due to its rectangular shape and size, the crate could not be balanced equally on the hand dolly
As one person pulled, and the other person pushed, the crate slid off the dolly and the IP lost his grip on the dolly's handle

controls.name: Route planning and obstacle awareness during load transport
controls.barrier_role: Identify and plan for deck obstacles before load movement
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to anticipate and manage environmental hazards

supporting_text: As personnel pulled the crate across the deck, they encountered a 4 inch step-up, 2 feet from the opening of the cargo box

controls.name: First aid and medical response
controls.barrier_role: Minimize injury severity and provide timely medical treatment
controls.lod_basis: Recovery control to manage consequences after incident occurs

supporting_text: A cold pack was applied to reduce the swelling
The IP went upstairs to the quarters to elevate his foot
The IP was evacuated onshore by helicopter for medical evaluation and treatment

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
